distance_km.note: The City of Lakes Ski Marathon (the primary marathon event) is 30K according to source [5]. The 42K distance refers to separate events (Hoigaard's Classic and Loppet Freestyle) mentioned in source [3], not the main Loppet Festival Marathon.

elevation_m.note: Search results do not provide elevation gain/loss data for the Loppet Festival Marathon courses.

country.note: Multiple sources confirm the event is in the United States.

region_state_province.note: Multiple sources confirm the event is in Minnesota, specifically Minneapolis.

discipline.note: Source [5] confirms both classic and skate (freestyle) ski marathon options are offered on consecutive days (Saturday classic, Sunday skate).

typical_participants.note: Search results do not provide participant numbers for the Loppet Festival Marathon.

year_founded.note: Search results do not provide founding year or first edition date for the Loppet Festival Marathon.

official_website.note: Source [1] and [4] reference https://www.loppet.org as the official race website.

typical_race_date.note: Source [5] indicates the 2026 City of Lakes Ski Marathon is scheduled for Saturday, January 31 and Sunday, February 1, not the first weekend in February. The event occurs in late January/early February.
